message:
Command `# DRT runs detailed_route and then write_views. 
# Now restart LibreLane with --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting --run-tag pnr_run_v4
# This will resume from step 33+ using step 32's state_out.json as the starting state.

DESIGN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup /home/user/.nix-profile/bin/librelane \
    "$DESIGN_DIR/config.json" \
    --flow-name Classic \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v4 \
    --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting \
    > /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log 2>&1 &

echo "LibreLane DRT restart PID: $!"
echo $! > /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid
sleep 30
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED EARLY"
tail -15 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
LibreLane DRT restart PID: 518636
ENDED EARLY
Usage: librelane [OPTIONS] [CONFIG_FILES]...
Try 'librelane --help' for help.

Error: No such option: --flow-name Did you mean --flow?

extras.command:
# DRT runs detailed_route and then write_views. 
# Now restart LibreLane with --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting --run-tag pnr_run_v4
# This will resume from step 33+ using step 32's state_out.json as the starting state.

DESIGN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup /home/user/.nix-profile/bin/librelane \
    "$DESIGN_DIR/config.json" \
    --flow-name Classic \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v4 \
    --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting \
    > /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log 2>&1 &

echo "LibreLane DRT restart PID: $!"
echo $! > /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid
sleep 30
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED EARLY"
tail -15 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log
